creator: khera@kcilink.com
text:
Additional details:

From dmesg:
pcm0: <ESS Solo-1E> port 0x9400-0x9403,0x9800-0x9803,0xa000-0xa00f,0xa400-0xa40f,0xa800-0xa83f irq 5 at device 9.0 on pci0

The kernel config contains:

device          pcm


It used to work on a kernel built back on July 5.  Only addition to
this kernel is DEBUG=-g config.
